sourceMovie.title: The Entity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Entity works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hereditary
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Entity clicked for you, Hereditary (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Twelve Monkeys
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Entity clicked for you, Twelve Monkeys (1995) is a strong next stop: both trade in mystery and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Entity?
faq.answer: Try Hereditary, Ghostland, Twelve Monkeys—each shares DNA with The Entity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Entity?
faq.answer: The Entity (1982) is best described as Horror, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Entity worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
